title: 12 Pcs Christmas Bows for Gift Wrapping, 5”Xmas Holiday Decoration Pull - Reusable Ribbons Bow for Tree Decorations, Present, Party, Crafts & Holiday Decoration
features: 🎀 Premium red velvet bow set of 12 – Each set contains 12 exquisite Christmas ribbons. Ample quantity and diverse styles add festive cheer to gifts, Christmas trees, and holiday décor. No duplicates – freely DIY your presents.
🎁 Versatile festive decor and gift wrapping – Christmas ribbon suitable for gift wrapping, or to adorn Christmas trees, gift boxes, wreaths, garlands and party displays. Reusable and easy to secure.

✨ Elegant, Durable Material & Dimensions — Assembled dimensions: 12 x 8cm (4.7in x 3.1in). Suitable for most gift boxes. Made from plastic, these bow ties are waterproof, lightweight, safe, and colourfast for long-term reuse. Retain shape and lustre throughout the festive season without fading or tearing.

🎄 Simple to Use — Simply locate the two thin ribbons at the base of the large bow. Hold one ribbon steady with one hand while gently pulling the other two ribbons with your free hand to form the bow shape, sparking endless creative possibilities.
🏡 Perfect for Home & Craft Projects – Whether you're decorating your home, wrapping presents, or crafting with family, these bows add a warm and festive atmosphere to any space. festive patterns
description: Product Description 12 Pcs Christmas Bows for Gift Wrapping This Christmas ribbon drawstring bow set comprises 12 distinct styles, each boasting charming and varied designs.
